channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: ALagiya manavALa mAmuni
item.description: azhagiya maNavALa mAmunigaL sri: srimathE rAmAnujAya nama: srimadh varavaramunayE nama: sri vAnAchala mahAmunayE nama: In the previous article (https://guruparamparai.wordpress.com/2012/09/19/thiruvaimozhi-pillai/) we discussed about thiruvAimozhi piLLai. Now we will move on to the next AchAryan in the OrAN vazhi guru paramparai. mamuni-ktpt Thirunakshathram: ippasi, thirumUlam avathAra sthalam: AzhwAr thirunagari AchAryan: thiruvAimozhi piLLai Sishyas: ashta dhik gajangaL – ponnadikkAl jIyar, kOil aNNan, pathangi paravasthu pattarpirAn jIyar, thiruvEnkata jIyar, eRumbiappA, prathivAdhi bhayankaram aNNan, appiLLai, appiLLAr.
